hero.title: SOS Moving Company in Los Angeles
hero.subtitle: Full-service local and interstate movers in Los Angeles, Seattle and Portland

about.title: Professional Moving Services in Los Angeles
about.text: SOS Moving is a licensed and insured moving company in Los Angeles serving residential and commercial clients across Southern California and beyond. Since our founding, we have completed thousands of successful relocations — from studio apartments in Downtown LA to five-bedroom homes in Calabasas, from small office suites to full corporate headquarters. Our track record has earned us a 4.9-star rating on Google from over 1,000 clients.
about.text2: Every move includes premium blankets, unlimited shrink wrap, wardrobe boxes, furniture disassembly and reassembly, and TV unmounting — all at no extra cost. Local rates start at $119 per hour. Call 909-443-0004 or request your free estimate online.

reviews.name: Jamon Pulliam
reviews.text: I called SOS last minute for a move and they came through! The guys were professional, fast, and super careful with my furniture. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: Kelsey Fawley
reviews.text: Amazing experience! They wrapped everything perfectly and nothing was damaged. The crew was friendly and efficient. Best moving company in LA!

reviews.name: Nicole Lai
reviews.text: SOS Moving made our move stress-free. They arrived on time, were incredibly efficient, and handled all our belongings with care. Would definitely use again!

reviews.name: Vish Saheb
reviews.text: Great service from start to finish. The team was professional, punctual, and careful with our belongings. Pricing was transparent — no hidden fees!

reviews.name: Malia F.
reviews.text: We used SOS for our office relocation and they were fantastic. Minimal downtime, everything was organized and nothing was lost or damaged.

reviews.name: Nikki P.
reviews.text: Second time using SOS and they never disappoint. Fair pricing, professional crew, and they genuinely care about your stuff. 10/10!

faq.question: How much do movers cost in Los Angeles?
faq.answer: Our rates start at $119 per hour for 2 movers and a truck on weekdays. Weekend rates start at $139/hour. All protective materials (blankets, shrink wrap, tape, wardrobe boxes) are included at no extra charge. The final cost depends on the size of your move, distance, and any special items that need handling.

faq.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faq.answer: Yes, SOS Moving & Storage is fully licensed and insured. Our USDOT number is 3398018, California license CAL-T0192140, and MC number 1153871. We carry full liability coverage to protect your belongings during the move.

faq.question: How far in advance should I book?
faq.answer: We recommend booking at least 1-2 weeks in advance, especially during peak moving season (May through September). However, we also handle last-minute moves when our schedule allows. Call us and we'll do our best to accommodate your timeline.

faq.question: Do you provide packing materials?
faq.answer: Yes! Every move includes free protective materials: moving blankets, shrink wrap, tape, and wardrobe boxes. For full packing services, our team will carefully pack all your belongings using professional-grade materials.

faq.question: What areas do you serve?
faq.answer: We serve all of Southern California including Los Angeles County, Orange County, San Fernando Valley, Inland Empire, and South Bay. We also offer long-distance moves to Portland (Oregon), Seattle (Washington), Denver (Colorado), and San Francisco.

faq.question: How do I get a free estimate?
faq.answer: You can get a free estimate by calling us at (909) 443-0004, filling out the form on our website, or booking online. We'll ask about your move details and provide a transparent quote with no hidden fees.

faq.question: Do you move specialty items like pianos or pool tables?
faq.answer: Yes, our White Glove service handles specialty items including pianos, pool tables, antiques, artwork, and other valuable or heavy items. Our team has specialized equipment and training for safe handling.

faq.question: What is your cancellation policy?
faq.answer: We understand plans change. You can cancel or reschedule your move free of charge up to 48 hours before the scheduled date. Cancellations within 48 hours may be subject to a fee. Please contact us as soon as possible if your plans change.
